title: Astonish Fabric Refresher Spray for Freshening Clothes, Curtains, Carpets and Fabrics, Cotton Fresh Scent, 750ml
features: Long Lasting Fragrance: Say goodbye to lingering odours and hello to long-lasting freshness. Our innovative formula uses ‘encapsulated’ technology for fragrance that lasts up to 42 days
Instantly Refreshes: Transform your living space into a haven of cleanliness and comfort in one spray. Whether it's pet odours, smoke, or everyday mustiness, our Fabric Refresher tackles them all
Multipurpose: Works on all fabrics, including your sofa, curtains, clothes, carpets, and more, leaving them smelling clean and inviting
Vegan & Cruelty Free: Astonish we are proud to say that all of our products are cruelty free and vegan as we believe you can get the job done without the need to test on animals
Easy to Use: With just a few spritzes, you can speedily refresh any fabrics, no scrubbing needed
description: Product Description Revive your home fabrics with Astonish Fabric Refresher Spray in a gentle Cotton Fresh scent. Designed to eliminate lingering odours and refresh soft furnishings, this 750ml spray is perfect for clothes, carpets, curtains, sofas, and more. The odour-neutralising formula works by breaking down unwanted smells, leaving your space with a long-lasting fresh feel. Ideal for homes with kids, pets, or just everyday life, it’s a quick and easy way to keep everything smelling clean. Like all Astonish products, it’s vegan, cruelty-free, and proudly made in the UK. Ingredients water, alcohol, and parfum (fragrance), along with other components like C9-11 Pareth-8, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Methanol, Carboxylate acrylic co-polymer, Benzisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone, and Sodium laureth sulfate. It's designed to neutralize odors and leave fabrics smelling fresh Directions Spray or mist onto fabrics. Leave to dry. See more
